rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS WALKER et al VS. PLATINUM CAPITAL GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 30, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT AURORA LOAN SERVICES' Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees On Appeal: GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant is awarded $10,327.50 as the prevailing party. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: 430 CAPISTRANO AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 30, 2014, Line 2: PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY'S Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds: GRANTED. No opposition received. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: AGRIPINO AYUDA ARCELO VS. DUVONCE L BEAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 30, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFF AGRIPINO ARCELO's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint: OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No courtesy copy of the moving papers was provided by October 10, 2014, as required by the Court's previous order. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIANO BUSTO et al VS. ALEJANDRO V. DIESTA JR. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer-Sets A, B And C From Pltffs And Each Of Them; Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 30, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT ALEX DIESTA'S Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories Motion For Monetary Sanctions: CONTINUED to November 6, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date to Department 501 by November 3, 2014. See Local Rule 2.6B. (501/LOT) - LATE TENTATIVE
